ValidationRule.description: INF Application Mandatory Before Closing Case (This is INF Serv team component- kept 'live' as fail-safe, e.g., Outlook crash 9/2-12 2002) PRIOR: MM: 06/17/2019 NEW: MG: 09/25/2022 standard syntax formatting & Error MSG (CASES' to CASE')
ValidationRule.errorMessage: V.RULE_CASE_032: Bugs and Suggestions are required
